channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260422.1)
item.description:
What's New

feat: detect Secure Input blocking and show floating overlay warning

Detect when macOS Secure Input mode is active (e.g., 1Password,

Terminal) and warn the user via a floating overlay near the cursor.

Implementation:

  • FloatingOverlay.swift: shared overlay component with multiple

positions (nearMouse, topCenter), view types (loading, brief,

warning), fade animations, auto-dismiss, and race-safe lifecycle

  • EventTapManager.checkSecureInput(): reads IOKit IOConsoleUsers

registry (same source as ioreg) for accurate PID detection

  • AppDelegate.checkAndWarnSecureInput(): runs at startup and every

app switch, shows overlay only when Vietnamese mode is ON

  • SecureInputOverlay/TranslationLoadingOverlay: thin wrappers with

independent FloatingOverlay instances to prevent cross-dismissal

  • Overlay dismisses immediately when Secure Input is released

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
